concerns.text: FR-001 mandates a 'retry mechanism with exponential backoff' for the PubChem API. The plan explicitly abandons the API in favor of a static HuggingFace dataset (Section 'Note on Dataset Strategy'). Consequently, the plan contains no task to implement the retry logic required by FR-001, leaving this functional requirement unbacked.

The spec's Edge Cases require a 'timeout of 60 seconds per molecule' for RDKit hangs. The plan's 'Technical Context' and 'Complexity Tracking' mention chunked processing and memory limits but do not explicitly define a task or mechanism to enforce a per-molecule timeout, leaving this safety requirement unbacked.
